content: I worked at VedaCorp from 2020 to July 2023. On June 10, 2023, I noticed inconsistencies in vendor invoices — GSTINs were invalid, addresses were residential, and bank accounts were opened after transaction dates. I cross-checked with the ERP and found no contracts. I reported this to HR on July 3. On July 5, I was fired. I never had access to the digital signing system. The email I sent to the MCA whistleblower portal was from my personal device. I never claimed to have seen Arjun Mehta sign the minutes — that’s a misquote. I only said I saw the signed minutes on the server. I did not plant the fraud. I am being framed. My email metadata showing Priya Mehta’s device was a hack — someone accessed my account after I logged out at work. I have proof of my login times. I fear for my life. I want justice.
